Title: ABI/Inform
Description: Business research database providing scholarly articles, trade publications, company profiles, industry reports, and business news. Supports research in management, finance, accounting, marketing, entrepreneurship, and economics.

Title: Ad*Access
Description: Digital archive of historical U.S. and Canadian advertisements from 1911 to 1955. Useful for research on marketing, consumer culture, media history, visual design, and advertising trends.
Access note: Requires users to register for an account with a valid Yale email address.
Subjects: Business & Economics; News & Media; Humanities & History

Title: Advertising Age
Description: News and analysis platform covering advertising, marketing, media, agencies, and brand strategy. Supports research on marketing trends, campaign strategy, and advertising industry developments.

Title: American City Business Journals
Description: Collection of local business news, company information, and economic reporting from major U.S. metropolitan areas. Useful for regional business, entrepreneurship, and economic development research.
Access note: Requires users to request an individual account with a Yale email address.

Title: American Energy Society
Description: Energy information platform providing industry news, reports, white papers, podcasts, and market intelligence. Supports research on energy markets, climate policy, technology, and sustainability.
Access note: New users will need to register for an individual account using a valid Yale email address .
Subjects: Energy & Environment; Business & Economics; Government & Public Policy

Title: Associations Unlimited
Description: Directory of professional, trade, cultural, labor, and nonprofit organizations in the United States and abroad. Useful for identifying associations, professional networks, and organizational contacts.
Access note: Descriptions and contact information for over 500 membership organizations from around the world, including professional and trade associations, labor unions, and cultural organizations. Included titles: Encyclopedia of Associations: National Organizations of the U.S., Encyclopedia of Associations: International Organizations, and Encyclopedia of Associations: Regional, State & Local Associations .

Title: Audit Analytics
Description: Database of corporate disclosures, audit information, accounting practices, regulatory filings, and compliance activity. Supports research in accounting, corporate governance, financial reporting, and regulation.
Access note: Available via WRDS or the Audit Analytics website. Both options require users to register for an account with a valid Yale email address.

Title: BBC Research
Description: Market research platform covering emerging technologies, healthcare, energy, materials, biotechnology, and industrial sectors. Useful for technology forecasting, industry analysis, and market assessment.
Subjects: Energy & Environment; Health & Medicine; Business & Economics

Title: Bloomberg Terminal
Description: Professional financial data platform providing real-time market data, company information, economic indicators, analytics, and news. Widely used for investment, finance, and economic research.

Title: Bloomberg.com
Description: News and data platform covering global markets, business, economics, politics, technology, and policy. Supports research on current events, financial markets, and business trends.
Access note: Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address.Bloomberg.com accounts are reset annually after the spring semester. Returning users may need to re-register with their @yale.edu address at that time.
Subjects: Business & Economics; Government & Public Policy; News & Media

Title: Business Insider
Description: Digital news platform featuring reporting on business, technology, finance, careers, and global affairs. Useful for tracking companies, industries, labor markets, and emerging business trends.
Access note: Requires users to register for an account with a Yale email address.
Subjects: Business & Economics; Social Sciences; News & Media

Title: Business of Fashion Professional
Description: Industry intelligence platform covering global fashion markets, companies, retail strategy, and consumer trends. Supports research on fashion business, luxury markets, and brand strategy.
Access note: Requires users to register for an account with a Yale email address. The campus subscription does not include access to BoF Insights reports.

Title: Business Source Ultimate
Description: Comprehensive business database providing scholarly journals, trade publications, industry reports, SWOT analyses, case studies, and company profiles. Supports research across business disciplines.

Title: Caixin Global
Description: English-language news source covering Chinese business, finance, economics, politics, and public policy. Useful for research on China's economy, markets, and regulatory environment.
Access note: Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address for access.
Subjects: Energy & Environment; Business & Economics; Government & Public Policy

Title: Calcbench
Description: Financial statement database built from SEC XBRL filings of public companies. Supports accounting, auditing, financial analysis, and corporate reporting research.
Access note: Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address for access.

Title: Capital IQ
Description: Financial intelligence platform providing company financials, transactions, ownership data, market information, and professional profiles worldwide. Widely used for business, investment, and economic research.
Access note: Requires registering an individual account with a Yale email address. Individuals who do not want to create an individual account can use S&P NetAdvantage for similar functionality.

Title: Carbon Pulse
Description: News and intelligence platform covering carbon markets, emissions trading, greenhouse gas pricing, climate policy, and sustainability initiatives. Supports environmental economics and climate governance research.
Access note: Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address for access.
Subjects: Energy & Environment; Business & Economics; Government & Public Policy

Title: CB Insights
Description: Database tracking startups, investors, venture capital activity, funding rounds, acquisitions, and emerging industries. Useful for entrepreneurship, innovation, and technology market research.
Access note: Requires users to register for an account using a Yale email address. Note: Expert Intelligence reports are not available with academic or university accounts.

Title: CDP Climate Data
Description: Company-reported environmental and climate disclosure data covering emissions, sustainability practices, and supply-chain activity. Supports ESG, climate risk, and corporate sustainability research.

Title: CEIC Data
Description: Global economic and financial database containing macroeconomic, sector, regional, and alternative data from official and commercial sources. Supports comparative economic and policy research.

Title: Centralbanking.com
Description: Information resource focused on central banking, monetary policy, financial stability, banking regulation, and financial technologies. Useful for research on economic policy and financial systems.

Title: Conference Board
Description: Source for economic indicators, business research, and management intelligence. Supports research on economic conditions, consumer confidence, workforce trends, and organizational performance.
Access note: Off-campus users must be logged in to Yale’s VPN OR must create an account with their @yale.edu email address.

Title: CoreLogic
Description: Property, mortgage, deed, tax, and real estate market database covering U.S. housing markets. Supports research in housing, urban economics, finance, and real estate.

Title: Crunchbase
Description: Database of private and public companies, investors, funding rounds, acquisitions, and startup activity. Supports research on entrepreneurship, innovation ecosystems, and venture capital.

Title: Data Axle
Description: Business directory containing current and historical information on millions of U.S. and Canadian companies. Useful for business demographics, market analysis, and geographic research.
Subjects: Business & Economics; Social Sciences; GIS & Spatial Data

Title: Data Explr
Description: Historical database of U.S. private companies with information on sales, employment, industry classification, location, and ownership. Supports longitudinal business and economic research.
Access note: Data for 1981 and 1984 are not available. An individual Data Exlpr account is required to access this data.
Subjects: Business & Economics; GIS & Spatial Data; Humanities & History

Title: Datacenter Knowledgebase (451 Research)
Description: Global database of data center facilities, infrastructure, capacity, utilization, and market activity. Useful for research on cloud computing, digital infrastructure, and technology markets.

Title: Datastream
Description: Historical financial database containing securities prices, economic indicators, commodities, bonds, and market data. Supports quantitative finance, investment analysis, and economic research.

Title: Dewey Data
Description: Platform providing access to licensed third-party research datasets across healthcare, workforce, consumer behavior, transportation, and other domains. Useful for discovering specialized datasets.

Title: eCommerceDB
Description: Global e-commerce database covering online retailers, revenue, market development, competitors, traffic, and digital commerce indicators. Supports retail, consumer behavior, and digital economy research.
Access note: Also accessible via Statista.

Title: EconLit
Description: Comprehensive index of economics literature including journal articles, books, working papers, dissertations, conference proceedings, and reviews. Supports scholarly research in economics and related fields.

Title: EIU Viewpoint
Description: Political and economic intelligence platform providing country analysis, forecasts, policy insights, and risk assessments. Useful for international business, public policy, and global market research.

Title: eMarketer
Description: Market data and analysis platform focused on digital advertising, social media, e-commerce, retail, and consumer technology. Supports research on digital markets and media trends.
Subjects: Business & Economics; Social Sciences; News & Media

Title: EMIS
Description: Market intelligence platform providing company, industry, country, and news data for emerging and established markets. Supports global business, market, and economic research.
Access note: If you are prompted to login, select the Guest Access option.

Title: Esri Business Analyst
Description: Web-based GIS and market analysis platform with demographic, consumer, employment, and location data. Supports spatial analysis, site selection, and market research.
Access note: Requires an individual account. For more information and to request an account, visit: Online Mapping Resources: Esri Business Analyst Web Apps.
Subjects: Business & Economics; Social Sciences; GIS & Spatial Data

Title: Factiva
Description: Global news database with current and archival coverage from newspapers, magazines, newswires, and business sources. Supports news, company, industry, and policy research.
Access note: Per our license agreement, Factiva may not be used for text mining projects.
Subjects: Business & Economics; Government & Public Policy; News & Media

Title: FactSet
Description: Financial data and analytics platform covering global companies, markets, securities, estimates, and economic data. Supports investment research, financial modeling, and market analysis.
Access note: Access to FactSet is made possible by Yale School of Management. FactSet Workstation is available for Faculty & PhD Students.

Title: Finaeon
Description: Historical financial and economic time-series database covering countries, markets, exchange rates, interest rates, commodities, inflation, and securities. Supports long-run financial and economic research.

Title: Financial Times
Description: Digital news source covering global business, finance, economics, politics, and markets. Useful for current awareness and research on international business and economic issues.
Subjects: Business & Economics; Government & Public Policy; News & Media

Title: Foundation Directory Online Professional
Description: Database of U.S. foundations, grantmakers, corporate giving programs, public charities, grants, and IRS filings. Supports philanthropy, nonprofit, and funding research.

Title: Frost and Sullivan
Description: Market research platform covering technology, healthcare, transportation, defense, chemicals, electronics, communications, and other industries. Useful for industry analysis and market forecasting.
Subjects: Health & Medicine; Business & Economics; Technology & Innovation

Title: Gale Business Insights
Description: Business information platform providing company profiles, SWOT analyses, industry coverage, market share data, histories, chronologies, and articles. Supports company and industry research.

Title: Gallup Analytics
Description: Polling and survey data platform covering U.S. and global public opinion. Supports research on attitudes, behavior, social trends, and cross-national comparisons.

Title: Gartner
Description: Information technology research platform providing reports, analysis, and trends on IT markets, vendors, and strategy. Supports technology management and digital transformation research.

Title: Global Development Finance
Description: World Bank dataset on financial flows, external debt, and financial indicators for developing countries. Supports research on development finance and international economic conditions.

Title: GlobalData Medical and Pharmaceutical Intelligence Centers
Description: Market research platform covering medical device and pharmaceutical industries. Supports research on healthcare markets, drug development, competitive intelligence, and industry trends.

Title: GoinGlobal
Description: Career and employment information platform with country guides, job search resources, visa information, salary data, and workplace advice. Supports global career and labor market research.

Title: GuideStar Pro
Description: Nonprofit organization database with information on programs, finances, leadership, and IRS filings. Useful for nonprofit, philanthropy, civic sector, and organizational research.
Access note: For assistance with downloading lists with more than 1000 results, please contact business.reference@yale.edu.

Title: Handbooks in Economics
Description: Full-text collection of scholarly handbooks in economics, finance, econometrics, and related fields. Supports literature review and advanced disciplinary research.

Title: Harvard Business Publishing eBooks Collection
Description: Ebook collection covering management, leadership, entrepreneurship, strategy, human resources, and related business topics. Useful for teaching, professional development, and business research.

Title: IBISWorld
Description: Industry research platform with reports on market size, trends, performance, risks, major companies, and forecasts. Supports industry analysis, business planning, and market research.
Access note: Due to licensing restrictions with IBISWorld, users are limited to fewer than 50 downloads per session. Exceeding this limit may result in a university-wide loss of access to this resource.

Title: IEA Statistics Package
Description: Energy statistics resource from the International Energy Agency. Supports research on energy production, consumption, trade, prices, and energy policy across countries.

Title: ImpactAlpha
Description: News and analysis source covering impact investing, sustainable finance, social enterprise, and market-based approaches to social change. Supports ESG and social impact research.
Access note: Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address.
Subjects: Energy & Environment; Business & Economics; Social Sciences

Title: Indiastat
Description: Statistical database providing India-specific socioeconomic, industry, demographic, and government data. Supports regional, policy, development, and market research on India.
Subjects: Business & Economics; Government & Public Policy; Social Sciences

Title: Inside Philanthropy
Description: News and information platform covering foundations, major donors, grantmaking, philanthropy jobs, and funding opportunities. Supports research on philanthropy and nonprofit funding.
Access note: Requires users to register for an individual account.

Title: International Financial Statistics - IMF
Description: IMF statistical database covering international and domestic finance, monetary indicators, exchange rates, prices, production, and national accounts. Supports macroeconomic and international finance research.

Title: JSTOR
Description: Digital archive of scholarly journals, books, and primary sources across many disciplines. Supports literature reviews and historical research in business and related fields.

Title: Kanopy
Description: Streaming video platform offering educational films and documentaries across a range of subject areas. Useful for teaching, course support, and media-based research.

Title: Leadership Connect
Description: Directory of leaders and organizations in business, government, and nonprofit sectors in the United States. Useful for contact research and organizational mapping.
Access note: Requires users to sign in with an @Yale.edu email address. Users will be directed to the Yale CAS sign-in page. Note: The export function is not available with our subscription.
Subjects: Business & Economics; Government & Public Policy; Social Sciences

Title: LSEG
Description: Financial markets platform providing company financials, filings, estimates, transactions, market data, and analyst research. Supports investment, corporate finance, and market research.
Access note: Requires users to register for an individual account.

Title: LSEG Tick History
Description: Historical intraday market data source with time-and-sales, quotes, and market-depth data for futures. Supports high-frequency finance and market microstructure research.
Access note: email to request access: business.reference@yale.edu

Title: Making of the Modern World
Description: Digital archive of economic and business literature published from 1450 through 1850. Supports historical research on commerce, political economy, and social thought.
Subjects: Business & Economics; Government & Public Policy; Social Sciences

Title: Market Research & American Business, 1935-1965
Description: Digital archive of market research reports and consumer studies from mid-twentieth-century American business. Supports research on advertising, consumer culture, and business history.
Subjects: Business & Economics; News & Media; Humanities & History

Title: MarketResearch.com Academic
Description: Market research platform providing reports on consumer, demographic, lifestyle, industrial, and product markets. Supports industry analysis, market sizing, and consumer research.

Title: Media Radar 360
Description: Advertising intelligence platform covering advertising expenditures across television, radio, magazines, newspapers, and other media. Supports media planning and advertising market research.

Title: Mergent Archives
Description: Historical corporate document archive including corporate manuals, municipal manuals, and annual reports. Supports company history, financial history, and archival business research.

Title: Mergent Intellect
Description: Global business directory with public and private company data, executive contacts, and industry research from D&B Hoovers. Supports company and market research.

Title: Mergent Municipal Bond Database
Description: Dataset of municipal bond attributes with historical coverage dating back several decades. Supports fixed income, public finance, and municipal market research.
Subjects: Business & Economics; Government & Public Policy; Humanities & History

Title: Mintel GNPD
Description: Global product database tracking new consumer packaged goods across food, beverage, household, beauty, health, and pet sectors. Supports product innovation and market research.
Access note: Requires users to create a profile using your @yale.edu email address. Find step-by-step instructions for accessing Mintel GNPD in Yale Business Answers Now.
Subjects: Health & Medicine; Business & Economics; Technology & Innovation

Title: Mintel Reports
Description: Consumer market research platform with reports on U.S. and global markets, consumer attitudes, segmentation, and purchasing behavior. Supports marketing and consumer research.

Title: Moody's CRE
Description: Commercial real estate database with property data, rent levels, vacancy rates, sales comparables, forecasts, and market trends. Supports real estate and urban economics research.
Access note: Requires users to request an individual account with a Yale email address.

Title: Moody's Default & Recovery Database
Description: Credit risk database covering ratings, defaults, and recovery data for global sovereign and corporate debt securities. Supports fixed income and credit risk research.
Access note: Requires users to request an individual account with a Yale email address.

Title: Morningstar Direct
Description: Investment database and analytics platform covering funds, indexes, portfolios, ownership, and performance data worldwide. Supports investment analysis and asset management research.
Access note: Available at Marx Library on a dedicated workstation.

Title: New York Times
Description: Digital news source providing current and archival reporting on politics, business, culture, science, and global affairs. Supports current awareness and news research.
Subjects: Business & Economics; Government & Public Policy; News & Media

Title: Nexis Uni
Description: Full-text news, business, legal, and company information database. Supports research using newspapers, magazines, transcripts, legal sources, and company profiles.

Title: OECD iLibrary
Description: OECD platform providing books, reports, journals, and statistical data on economics, policy, development, education, environment, and society. Supports comparative policy research.
Subjects: Energy & Environment; Business & Economics; Government & Public Policy

Title: Orbis
Description: Global company database covering public and private firms, ownership structures, financials, and corporate relationships. Valuable for international business and organizational research.
Access note: Point in-time historical data available by request

Title: Orbis Historical
Description: Historical company dataset from Orbis providing point-in-time information for longitudinal business research. Supports analysis of firm characteristics, ownership, and financial data over time.

Title: Orbis Intellectual Property
Description: Patent and company intelligence platform linking global patent data to corporate information. Supports research on innovation, intellectual property, technology strategy, and firms.
Subjects: Business & Economics; GIS & Spatial Data; Technology & Innovation

Title: Panjiva
Description: Global trade database with import and export records, suppliers, buyers, products, and shipment trends. Supports supply chain, trade, and sourcing research.
Access note: Requires users to request an individual account with a Yale email address.

Title: Passport
Description: Market research platform from Euromonitor with consumer, industry, country, and market data. Supports international market analysis, consumer trends, and business research.

Title: Pharmaprojects
Description: Pharmaceutical research and development database tracking drugs by company, disease, therapeutic class, and development phase. Supports drug pipeline and biomedical market research.
Access note: Requires users to register for an individual account.
Subjects: Health & Medicine; Business & Economics; GIS & Spatial Data

Title: Pitchbook
Description: Private capital database covering companies, investors, funds, deals, exits, and service providers. Supports venture capital, private equity, and entrepreneurship research.
Access note: Requires users to sign in with an @Yale.edu email address. Users will be directed to the Yale CAS sign-in page. Do not click "Log in without SSO" even if you had an individual account previously. Commercial use is prohibited. Users are limited to 10 downloads per day and 25 downloads per month. (1 download = 1 row of data on an Excel file). Accounts will automatically be reset annually on May 31.

Title: PolicyMap
Description: Interactive mapping platform combining demographic, housing, health, economic, and policy data from public and proprietary sources. Supports place-based research and spatial analysis.
Subjects: Health & Medicine; Business & Economics; Government & Public Policy

Title: Political Risk Yearbook
Description: Country risk publication providing political, financial, and economic risk assessments for international business and investment. Supports global strategy and policy research.

Title: Politico Pro
Description: Policy intelligence platform covering legislative, regulatory, and political developments, including energy and environment news. Supports government, policy, and advocacy research.
Subjects: Energy & Environment; Government & Public Policy; GIS & Spatial Data

Title: Preqin
Description: Alternative assets database covering private equity, private debt, real estate, infrastructure, natural resources, and hedge funds. Supports private markets and investment research.
Access note: Private data from Preqin is available in WRDS.

Title: PrivCo
Description: Business and financial database focused on major private companies, including venture-backed, family-owned, and private-equity-owned firms. Supports private company and market research.
Access note: Requires users to sign up for an account using a Yale email address.

Title: ProQuest Dissertations & Theses Global
Description: Comprehensive database of dissertations and theses from universities worldwide. Supports literature reviews, graduate research, and discovery of emerging scholarship.

Title: Proquest Historical Annual Reports
Description: Digital archive of annual reports from major North American companies over more than a century. Supports corporate history, financial history, and business research.
Subjects: Business & Economics; Humanities & History; Technology & Innovation

Title: Proquest Statistical Abstract of the U.S.
Description: Statistical reference source summarizing U.S. demographic, economic, political, and social data. Supports quick access to national statistics and historical context.
Subjects: Business & Economics; Government & Public Policy; Social Sciences

Title: Pyrra Discovery Platform
Description: Research platform for monitoring online narratives, emerging communities, and digital information environments. Supports analysis of public discourse, media ecosystems, and online activity.
Subjects: Energy & Environment; News & Media; Technology & Innovation

Title: RKMA Market Research Handbook Series
Description: Downloadable market research handbooks covering consumer behavior, media, travel, retail, food, healthcare, sports, and related sectors. Supports industry and market analysis.
Subjects: Health & Medicine; Business & Economics; News & Media

Title: Roper iPOLL
Description: Public opinion database of U.S. national survey questions and responses dating back to 1935. Supports polling, political behavior, and social trends research.

Title: S&P Capital IQ Pro
Description: Financial intelligence platform providing company, industry, market, credit, energy, and real estate data. Supports investment, corporate finance, and industry research.
Access note: Requires users to register for an individual account. Current Capital IQ account holders can access the platform directly using the S&P Capital IQ Pro link in the upper right corner of the Captial IQ page.
Subjects: Energy & Environment; Business & Economics; GIS & Spatial Data

Title: S&P NetAdvantage
Description: Business research platform with company profiles, financials, industry surveys, stock reports, and screening tools. Supports company, industry, and investment research.

Title: S&P RatingsDirect (Available through S&P Capital IQ)
Description: Credit research platform providing S&P ratings, reports, and analysis for global bond issues. Supports fixed income, credit risk, and public finance research.
Access note: To access, login to Capital IQ and select the Ratings Direct search option. Requires new users to register for an account.

Title: Sage Business Cases
Description: Collection of business case studies from global publishers and universities. Supports classroom teaching and research in management, entrepreneurship, healthcare, and social enterprise.
Access note: Sage Business Cases are licensed for all Yale affiliates and can be used for classroom teaching.
Subjects: Health & Medicine; Business & Economics; Social Sciences

Title: Scopus
Description: Academic abstract and citation database covering peer-reviewed journals, conference proceedings, and books across scientific, medical, technical, and social science fields. Supports literature review and citation analysis.
Subjects: Health & Medicine; Social Sciences; Humanities & History

Title: SDC Platinum
Description: Transaction database covering new issues, bonds, syndicated loans, mergers and acquisitions, governance, private equity, and infrastructure. Supports corporate finance and deal research.
Access note: Available by request on LSEG Workpsace or WRDS.

Title: SimplyAnalytics
Description: Web-based mapping and data platform with census, consumer, market, and local demographic data. Supports geographic analysis, market research, and community studies.
Subjects: Business & Economics; Social Sciences; GIS & Spatial Data

Title: Social Explorer
Description: Interactive mapping and data platform providing demographic and census data for the United States. Supports historical, spatial, and community-level research.
Subjects: Social Sciences; GIS & Spatial Data; Humanities & History

Title: Social Science Research Network (SSRN)
Description: Repository of working papers, accepted papers, and abstracts across social science disciplines. Supports discovery of current research in accounting, economics, finance, marketing, and law.
Subjects: Business & Economics; Social Sciences; News & Media

Title: Sports Business Research Network (SBRnet)
Description: Sports market research platform with consumer, industry, participation, sponsorship, and expenditure data. Supports sports business, marketing, and consumer behavior research.

Title: STAT+
Description: News and analysis platform covering biotechnology, pharmaceuticals, clinical trials, health policy, and healthcare business. Supports research on biomedical innovation and health industry trends.
Access note: Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address.
Subjects: Health & Medicine; Business & Economics; Government & Public Policy

Title: Statista
Description: Statistics portal aggregating data, charts, infographics, dossiers, and reports from thousands of sources. Supports quick fact-finding, market research, and data visualization.

Title: Sustainable Views
Description: Financial Times publication covering sustainable finance, ESG policy, regulation, and market trends. Supports research on sustainability, investment, and corporate responsibility.
Access note: Requires users to request an individual account with a Yale email address.
Subjects: Energy & Environment; Business & Economics; Government & Public Policy

Title: The Block Pro
Description: Research and data platform covering digital assets, cryptocurrency markets, blockchain companies, and industry trends. Supports research on crypto, fintech, and decentralized finance.
Access note: Requires users to register for an account with a valid Yale email address.

Title: The Economist
Description: Current and archival magazine source covering world affairs, economics, business, politics, science, and culture. Supports current awareness and international policy research.
Access note: Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address for access.
Subjects: Business & Economics; Government & Public Policy; News & Media

Title: The Information
Description: Technology business news source with reporting on companies, startups, platforms, venture capital, and digital markets. Supports research on technology industries and strategy.
Access note: Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address. Please note: The Information Pro content is not included with academic or university subscriptions.
Subjects: Business & Economics; News & Media; Technology & Innovation

Title: UN Comtrade Premium
Description: International trade database providing detailed commodity and partner-country statistics reported by national authorities. Supports trade, supply chain, and economic research.

Title: UNdata
Description: United Nations statistical portal combining data from multiple UN databases. Supports cross-national research on demographics, economics, development, environment, and society.
Subjects: Energy & Environment; Business & Economics; Social Sciences

Title: Vault
Description: Career research platform with employer profiles, industry guides, rankings, interview advice, and job search resources. Supports career exploration and labor market research.
Access note: Current students, faculty, and staff can log in to Vault with their NetID.

Title: VitalLaw - Blue Chip Publications
Description: Economic forecasting resource providing Blue Chip consensus forecasts and archived indicators in Excel and PDF formats. Supports macroeconomic, financial, and forecasting research.
Access note: Requires users to register for an account with a Yale email address for access.

Title: Wall Street Journal Online
Description: Digital newspaper covering business, finance, markets, politics, technology, and global news. Supports current awareness and business news research.
Subjects: Business & Economics; Government & Public Policy; News & Media

Title: WARC
Description: Advertising and marketing intelligence platform with case studies, best practices, brand insights, and industry analysis. Supports marketing strategy, media, and consumer research.

Title: Web of Science
Description: Multidisciplinary citation index covering journals, conference proceedings, data sets, and scholarly resources. Supports literature review, citation analysis, and research impact assessment.

Title: World Development Indicators
Description: World Bank database of global development indicators compiled from official country, regional, and international sources. Supports development economics and comparative policy research.

Title: WRDS - Wharton Research Data Service
Description: Research platform providing access to licensed business, finance, economics, accounting, banking, labor market, and ESG datasets. Includes resources such as CRSP, Compustat, Audit Analytics,  Revelio, Bank Regulatory Data, S&P ESG Scores, and many others.

Title: ProQuest TDM Studio
Description: Text and data mining platform providing access to licensed scholarly and news content for computational analysis, corpus building, and digital scholarship. Supports text analysis, visualization, and large-scale research using published content.

Title: Yale Data Green
Description: Yale Data Green contains a collection of datasets made available by various groups across the university for cloud-based querying and analysis and is powered by Redivis.

Title: Gale Digital Scholar Lab
Description: Text analysis and digital humanities platform for building and exploring text corpora from Gale primary source collections and uploaded content. Supports topic modeling, sentiment analysis, named entity recognition, visualization, and other computational research methods.
